note: Clint's app UI is Angular 21 + PrimeNG + Tailwind v4, which cannot render in claude.ai/design's React runtime. This sync therefore exports design tokens, fonts, and styles.css only (no components), so the design agent's React designs match Clint's palette and typography. Token sources: src/client/src/styles.css (brand teal scale), src/client/src/app/config/primeng-theme.ts (slate surface scale, radius=0, semantic mappings), src/client/src/app/core/models/phase-colors.ts (phase + development-status colors), supabase/seed.sql (marker colors), docs/brand.md + docs/design-system.md (rules).
